indicators.name: Dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not suitable for computer work as they lack the necessary space and ergonomics.

indicators.name: Chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are not ergonomic and do not provide sufficient support for extended periods of computer use.

indicators.name: Ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide adequate lighting for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the lack of ergonomic furniture and suitable work surfaces, but has good lighting.
